steps: Submit formal reclaim to Goldman Sachs requesting return of USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividend (account 1901234567)
Reference US-UK tax treaty Article 10 specifying 15% maximum withholding rate for qualifying UK resident
Provide Goldman Sachs with treaty documentation showing correct net amount should be USD 114,750.00
Request confirmation of corrected payment processing within 30 business days
